content:
Artist: Phil Collins
Song: Another Day in Paradise
Standard Tuning

B|--9------8------6------11-|

E|----------------------11--|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
She calls out to the man on the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
"Sir, can you help me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
It's cold and I've nowhere to sleep,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
Is there somewhere you can tell me?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
He walks on, doesn't look back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
He pretends he can't hear her[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
Starts to whistle as he crosses the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
She's embarrassed to be there[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]F7sus4[/ch]                     EbSus4
Oh, think twice, cause it's another day for[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]
You and me in paradise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]F7sus4[/ch]                     EbSus4
Oh, think twice, cause it's another day for you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]    F7Sus4 [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]
You and me in paradise[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
She calls out to the man on the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
He can see she's been crying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
She's got blisters on the soles of her feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]         [ch]Bbm13[/ch]
Ooooooooh Lord,[/tab]
Cm7            Eb7Sus4
Is nothing more anybody can do
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bbm13[/ch]
Ooooooooh Lord,[/tab]
Cm7                         Eb7Sus4        Eb7Sus4
There must be something you can saaaaaaaaay

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
You can tell from the lines on her face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
